children.text: You can change units if any system default does not work for you.
Age in weeks will give you actual days.
Use DESC if you want to see last log first.

The last feeding information will be shown on the main page. The supplemental feeding will be shown as the last feeding also. If you want to hide the supplemental feeding information on the main page, disable this option.
Count last feeding time using nursing start or finish time.
Statistical analysis can use midnight to split overnight sleep time to 2 days.
You can reduce space usage and speed up backup/restore by scaling photos to one of the sizes listed below.
If you don't want to use timer to log nursing, turn this off.
You can turn on night mode when you feed baby in dark.
For premature baby, this will adjust age based on due date for growth records.
